conclusion: Languagetool transmitted 12 of 12 planted sensitive identifiers to external servers during default-configuration use (including the unique canary token). Overall, approximately 91.9% of the document's characters were transmitted (median across 5 runs; std dev 0.0pp; mean 91.9% 95% CI [91.9%, 91.9%]; reproducibility High). Of intercepted events, 100.0% used HTTPS.
